name: Camera / DSLR – Viewfinder HUD Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="cam-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cam-cta" x1="0" y1="0" x2="260" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="cam-vignette" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="55%">
      <stop offset="40%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="0.7"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="cam-img-clip">
      <rect x="80" y="120" width="920" height="900"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: near-black background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#cam-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: outer viewfinder frame -->
  <rect x="40" y="60" width="1000" height="1000" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.35"/>
  <rect x="80" y="100" width="920" height="940" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: corner brackets -->
  <path d="M40 130 L40 60 L110 60"   fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <path d="M970 60 L1040 60 L1040 130" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <path d="M40 930 L40 1060 L110 1060" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <path d="M970 1060 L1040 1060 L1040 930" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2.5"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: centre crosshair -->
  <line x1="540" y1="100"  x2="540" y2="180"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
  <line x1="540" y1="940"  x2="540" y2="1020" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
  <line x1="80"  y1="560"  x2="160" y2="560"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
  <line x1="920" y1="560"  x2="1000" y2="560" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.5"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="560" r="3"  fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="560" r="12" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: rule of thirds grid -->
  <line x1="386" y1="100"  x2="386"  y2="1020" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.08"/>
  <line x1="694" y1="100"  x2="694"  y2="1020" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.08"/>
  <line x1="80"  y1="393"  x2="1000" y2="393"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.08"/>
  <line x1="80"  y1="727"  x2="1000" y2="727"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.08"/>

  <!-- LAYER 6: HUD top edge -->
  <text x="48"   y="52" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_SHUTTER</text>
  <text x="200"  y="52" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_APERTURE</text>
  <text x="310"  y="52" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_ISO</text>
  <text x="540"  y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="920"  y="52" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_FORMAT</text>
  <text x="1032" y="52" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_REC</text>

  <!-- LAYER 7: HUD side edges (rotated) -->
  <text x="24"    y="560" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3" text-anchor="middle" transform="rotate(-90 24 560)">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_LEFT</text>
  <text x="1056"  y="560" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3" text-anchor="middle" transform="rotate(90 1056 560)">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_RIGHT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 8: HUD bottom edge -->
  <text x="48"   y="1080" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_BATTERY</text>
  <text x="330"  y="1080" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.3"  letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_AF</text>
  <text x="540"  y="1080" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_FOCUS</text>
  <text x="840"  y="1080" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.3"  letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_METER</text>
  <text x="1032" y="1080" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_HUD_SHOTS</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: product image inside viewfinder -->
  <rect x="80" y="120" width="920" height="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_IMG_BG"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#cam-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="80" y="120" width="920" height="900" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="80" y="120" width="920" height="900" fill="url(#cam-vignette)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 10: product name below viewfinder -->
  <text x="48" y="1168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="120" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF"                         letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="48" y="1274" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="120" font-weight="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35"       letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 11: price right side -->
  <text x="1032" y="1160" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_COMMENT</text>
  <text x="1032" y="1232" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="88" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="1032" y="1268" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace"    font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>

  <!-- LAYER 12: rule + CTA + specs -->
  <line x1="48" y1="1292" x2="1032" y2="1292" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>
  <rect x="48" y="1308" width="260" height="52" rx="0" fill="url(#cam-cta)"/>
  <text x="178" y="1341" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="360" y="1334" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_MONO, monospace" font-size="12" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC_LINE</text>
</svg>
